verse_text: This is the law of the one vowing, who vows to the Lord his gift to the Lord concerning his vow; and the force of his vow is not limited to what he could afford regarding his vow, which he vows according to the law of purity.'

links.context: The vow Paul makes is likely a form of the Nazirite vow ([[NUM.6:1]]-21) given in thanksgiving for deliverance from danger.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
